synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Jabba The Hutt One Shots – The Gaar Suppoon Hit (1995), The Hunger of Princess Nampi (1995), The Dynasty Trap (1995), & Betrayal (1995); Star Wars: Boba Fett – Enemy of the Empire (1999) #1-4; Star Wars: Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse (2011) #1-5; Star Wars: Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets (2012) #1-5; Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (2008) GN; Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (2010) GN; Star Wars: Blood Ties (2010) #1-4; Star Wars: Blood Ties – Boba Fett Is Dead (2012) #1-4; and material from Star Wars Tales (1999) #7, 11, 15-16, 18-20 and A Decade of Dark Horse (1996) #2.
title: Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 3
